rules: NO INTER or SPACE GROTESK fonts.
Headings must use Manrope with tight tracking.
Body must use IBM Plex Sans for maximum clinical data legibility.
Use explicit left-alignment for all patient data and clinical text.
Dark theme default. Avoid generic hospital blues. Use Amber as the primary action color for a premium, high-visibility contrast in low-light environments.
No full-screen gradients. Keep backgrounds solid to prevent data refraction.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Flat Solid Surfaces with 1px borders (border-slate-700). NO glassmorphism in this app to ensure clinical data clarity.
visual_enhancers.borders: Max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg) for cards, rounded-2xl or full for major buttons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders to separate overlapping elements. Use subtle shadow-lg for floating elements like the Voice Dictation button.

layouts.general: Mobile-first, optimized for iPhone/iPad. Max width for desktop is 800px to maintain mobile-app feel.
layouts.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (p-6, p-8) between sections. Dense padding within patient cards (p-4) to fit data.
layouts.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar (h-20) with 4 tabs: PACIENTES, PASE, NOTAS, INGRESOS. Add safe-area padding at the bottom.

views.patient_list: Vertical list of cards. No multi-column grids on mobile. iPad can use 2 columns (md:grid-cols-2).
views.patient_detail: Sticky header with patient core info (Name, bed, age). Scrollable body for daily entries. Large floating action button for Voice Dictation.

buttons.style: Large tap targets (min-h-[60px]). Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or large rounded-xl for main CTAs.
buttons.voice_dictation: Prominent, floating (or fixed at bottom above tab bar), circular, bg-amber-500 text-slate-950, very large microphone icon.
buttons.guardar: Full width button, bg-amber-500 text-slate-950, font-bold.

cards.style: bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg p-4. No shadows. High contrast text.
cards.content: Use flex-row for quick stats (Bed, Floor, Days), flex-col for diagnoses.

inputs.style: Large text areas for notes. bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg p-4 text-slate-50 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500. min-h-[60px] for inputs.
inputs.voice_support: Include visual indicators when voice dictation is active (e.g., pulsing animation).

tabs.style: Bottom navigation bar. bg-slate-900 border-t border-slate-800 fixed bottom-0 w-full flex justify-around items-center pb-safe pt-2 h-20 z-50.

rules: Snappy and responsive. No long fade-ins.
Micro-interactions: Buttons slightly scale down on active (scale-95).
Pulsing animation for active Voice Dictation to indicate recording state.
Slide-up transition for the patient detail view.
Minimum touch target size is 60x60px for critical actions (while walking).
WCAG AAA contrast for clinical text.
Include data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='tab-pacientes', data-testid='btn-voice-dictation', data-testid='input-daily-note').
Non-color encoding: Always pair status colors with icons.

icons.instructions: Install using 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'. Use weight='duotone' for active tabs, weight='regular' for inactive, and weight='fill' for the voice dictation mic.

views_structure.PACIENTES: Main censo list. Cards with: Nombre, Cama, Piso, Días estancia, Días postquirúrgicos, Dx resumido. Tap opens Patient Detail.
views_structure.Patient Detail: Persistent Header: Nombre, Edad, Sexo, Cama, Piso, Dx resumido/completo, Procedimiento quirúrgico/fecha, Hallazgos, Antecedentes, Interconsultantes, Tratamiento. Daily Entry Zone: Voice dictation button, text area, 'Guardar al Pase' button. Timeline of events below.
views_structure.PASE: Aggregated document view. Summarizes all patients' daily entries. Includes lab comparison section. Optimized for reading aloud during rounds.
views_structure.NOTAS: Generates structured evolution note and WhatsApp message per patient. Includes large 'Copiar' buttons.
views_structure.INGRESOS: Placeholder tab with 'Próximamente' message and a sleek locked graphic.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium medical web app for iOS (iPhone/iPad). Focus on mobile layouts.
Initialize Tailwind config with the specified slate and amber palette. Add Manrope and IBM Plex Sans to fonts.
Do NOT add 'text-align: center' to App.css.
Ensure the bottom navigation bar is fixed and handles iOS safe areas (pb-safe or pb-6).
Build the UI entirely in Spanish.
Include a small disclaimer on the Login screen: 'Esta herramienta no es un expediente clínico oficial ni sustituye el juicio médico.'
Implement Shadcn UI for basic components (Dialog, Tabs) but customize heavily to match the flat solid, 1px border aesthetic.
The Voice Dictation button must be the most visually prominent element on the patient daily entry screen. Provide a mock pulsing interaction for it.
Use Phosphor icons. Install the package: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
For the 'Patient Detail' view, make the patient demographics sticky at the top while scrolling the daily notes.
Add data-testid to every button, tab, card, and input.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop. Use high contrast, solid dark backgrounds, and crisp 1px borders.
Never use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors.
Create depth through z-index and 1px borders, NOT heavy box shadows.
Use pill-shaped or large rectangular buttons with specific hover/active states.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use 2x more padding than standard for touch targets. Everything must be easily tappable while walking (60px min height).
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Nota copiada', 'Guardado al Pase').
